summary: No launch-blocking evidence found by ShipCheck heuristics.

findings.title: Stripe event handling lacks idempotency evidence
findings.why_it_matters: Stripe may retry events, causing duplicate grants or updates.
findings.remediation: Store processed event IDs or use idempotent writes.

findings.title: No CI workflow found
findings.why_it_matters: Critical flows need automated checks before launch.
findings.remediation: Add a GitHub Actions workflow for tests and linting.

findings.title: No tests found
findings.why_it_matters: Payment and auth regressions are easy to ship without tests.
findings.remediation: Add focused tests for auth, payments, and core flows.

findings.title: Privacy policy or terms page is missing
findings.why_it_matters: Apps collecting user or payment data need clear trust and legal surfaces.
findings.remediation: Add privacy and terms pages linked from the app.

findings.title: No Next.js error boundary evidence found
findings.why_it_matters: User-facing failures should render controlled recovery UI.
findings.remediation: Add app/error.tsx or an ErrorBoundary component.

findings.title: Placeholder copy found
findings.remediation: Replace placeholders with specific product copy.
